properties.<CharacterNarrative>k__BackingField: Case after case… I’m starting to forget what peace feels like.\n\nA quiet vacation might finally give me the break I need.
properties.<EndLevelNarrative>k__BackingField: A much-needed break is overdue, I need to be away to refresh my mind...

<StoryClues>k__BackingField.ClueText: The <value subject="Location C" trait="Weather Forecast" val_index="0">Rainy</value> weather makes it a bit of a downer to have fun during the vacation
I'm not a big fan of alcohols, so the <value subject="Location B" trait="Facility" val_index="0">Bar</value> does not appeal to me
Going on the <value subject="Location A" trait="Type" val_index="0">Cruise</value> would cost an entire year of my income, that's more for retirement than now
I would love to go skiing, but the <value subject="Location D" trait="Type" val_index="0">Hotel</value> confirmed that it can't be done around the area
